aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic online presence with a functional website and schema markup, but lacks customer reviews and detailed content to improve search visibility.
quick_wins: Encourage satisfied customers to leave Google reviews to build credibility and improve local search rankings.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, customer testimonials, and a blog with relevant industry topics.

gbp_analysis.found: The business has a physical location in Gilbert, Arizona, and a website with contact information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and engagement, which are crucial for local search visibility.
critical_issues: No Google reviews, which impacts local search rankings and customer trust.
Insufficient engagement on the GBP, such as regular posts and updates.

nap_citations.summary: The business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are consistent on the website but need to be verified across major directories and local listings.
action_items: Verify and update NAP information on major directories like Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms, including social media profiles.

schema_gaps: Organization schema is present, but lacks detailed service and product schemas.
Review schema is missing, which could help display customer testimonials and ratings directly in search results.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement on GBP.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local HVAC services who rely on reviews and detailed service information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and updating GBP with regular posts and updates.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative content on the website and blog to establish the business as a local authority in the HVAC industry.
